scripts.dev: pnpm --filter ui build && pnpm --filter toaam-blog dev
scripts.build:blog: pnpm --filter ui build && pnpm --filter toaam-blog build
scripts.build:all: pnpm --filter ui build && pnpm --filter toaam-blog build
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf */node_modules && rm -rf */dist && rm -rf */.vitepress/dist && rm -rf */.vitepress/cache && rm -rf */.vitepress/.temp
